Data Report: nyctaxi_cleaned

Format: parquet · Modality: tabular · Rows: 7,804,523 · Cols: 20 · Size: 0.00 MB · Fingerprint:
Bottom line: ❌ 1 critical issue(s) — fix before any analysis or modeling.
1 critical 14 warning(s) 4 note(s)

🚨 Findings

🚨 Class imbalance in 'store_and_fwd_flag' store_and_fwd_flag
Standard accuracy and many ML metrics are misleading on imbalanced data; use AUPRC, weighted loss, or resampling instead.
⚠️ 'Airport_fee' is heavily skewed (γ₁=5.10) Airport_fee
Mean and standard deviation are unreliable summaries here; linear models will fit poorly without a transform.
Action: Apply transform: yeo-johnson (right-skewed with negatives).
⚠️ 'RatecodeID' is heavily skewed (γ₁=7.07) RatecodeID
Mean and standard deviation are unreliable summaries here; linear models will fit poorly without a transform.
Action: Apply transform: log1p (right-skewed, all positive).
⚠️ 'VendorID' is heavily skewed (γ₁=4.39) VendorID
Mean and standard deviation are unreliable summaries here; linear models will fit poorly without a transform.
Action: Apply transform: log1p (right-skewed, all positive).
⚠️ 'congestion_surcharge' is heavily skewed (γ₁=-2.51) congestion_surcharge
Mean and standard deviation are unreliable summaries here; linear models will fit poorly without a transform.
Action: Apply transform: reflect+log or yeo-johnson (left-skewed).
⚠️ 'fare_amount' is heavily skewed (γ₁=3.69) fare_amount
Mean and standard deviation are unreliable summaries here; linear models will fit poorly without a transform.
Action: Apply transform: log1p (right-skewed, all positive).

Mean and standard deviation are unreliable summaries here; linear models will fit poorly without a transform.
Action: Apply transform: reflect+log or yeo-johnson (left-skewed).
⚠️ 'passenger_count' is heavily skewed (γ₁=3.41) passenger_count
Mean and standard deviation are unreliable summaries here; linear models will fit poorly without a transform.
Action: Apply transform: log1p (right-skewed, all positive).

Mean and standard deviation are unreliable summaries here; linear models will fit poorly without a transform.
Action: Apply transform: log1p (right-skewed, all positive).
⚠️ 'tip_amount' is heavily skewed (γ₁=6.44) tip_amount
Mean and standard deviation are unreliable summaries here; linear models will fit poorly without a transform.
Action: Apply transform: log1p (right-skewed, all positive).
⚠️ 'tolls_amount' is heavily skewed (γ₁=33.21) tolls_amount
Mean and standard deviation are unreliable summaries here; linear models will fit poorly without a transform.
Action: Apply transform: log1p (right-skewed, all positive).
⚠️ 'fare_amount' has high VIF (767.2) fare_amount
Variance Inflation Factor above 10 means the column is mostly explainable from the other features; coefficient estimates in linear models will be unstable.
Action: Drop 'fare_amount' or merge with a correlated peer (see correlated_groups).
⚠️ 'tip_amount' has high VIF (40.1) tip_amount
Variance Inflation Factor above 10 means the column is mostly explainable from the other features; coefficient estimates in linear models will be unstable.
Action: Drop 'tip_amount' or merge with a correlated peer (see correlated_groups).
⚠️ 'tolls_amount' has high VIF (14.9) tolls_amount
Variance Inflation Factor above 10 means the column is mostly explainable from the other features; coefficient estimates in linear models will be unstable.
Action: Drop 'tolls_amount' or merge with a correlated peer (see correlated_groups).
⚠️ 'total_amount' has high VIF (1138.0) total_amount
Variance Inflation Factor above 10 means the column is mostly explainable from the other features; coefficient estimates in linear models will be unstable.
Action: Drop 'total_amount' or merge with a correlated peer (see correlated_groups).
ℹ️ 'trip_distance' and 'fare_amount' are highly correlated (r=0.915)
Strong linear relationship — likely redundant for downstream modeling, though they may capture different real-world quantities.
Action: Run check_multicollinearity in Phase 3 to assess VIF.
ℹ️ 'trip_distance' and 'total_amount' are highly correlated (r=0.894)
Strong linear relationship — likely redundant for downstream modeling, though they may capture different real-world quantities.
Action: Run check_multicollinearity in Phase 3 to assess VIF.
ℹ️ 'fare_amount' and 'total_amount' are highly correlated (r=0.973)
Strong linear relationship — likely redundant for downstream modeling, though they may capture different real-world quantities.
Action: Run check_multicollinearity in Phase 3 to assess VIF.
ℹ️ Correlated group of 3 features
These columns move together (|r|≥0.8) and likely measure the same underlying quantity. Keeping one is usually enough.
Action: Keep 'fare_amount'; drop the others.
